Title: Designates certain parts of the fifty-sixth assembly district a cease and desist zone and establishes an affirmative defense to violations of nonsolicitation orders and cease and desist zones
Summary: Designates the fifty-sixth assembly district encompassing community board 3 and community board 8 a cease and desist zone; establishes an affirmative defense to violations of nonsolicitation orders and cease and desist zones.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property law, in relation to designating the fifty-sixth assembly district encompassing community board 3 and community board 8 a cease and desist zone and establishing an affirmative defense to violations of nonsolicitation orders and cease and desist zones
